children.heading: .—Deployment of Data Analytics Capabilities
children.label: a .—Deployment of Data Analytics Capabilities
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall use competitive procedures under chapter 137 of this title to procure or develop technologies or services, including those based on commercially available information technologies and services to improve data collection and analyses to support preparation of auditable financial statements for the Department of Defense.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: .—Use of Funding and Resources
children.label: b .—Use of Funding and Resources
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may use science and technology funding, prototypes, and test and evaluation resources as appropriate in support of deployment of technologies and services as described in subsection (a).
